name: Flannel Baby Blankets - Unicorns - 4pk - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your little one's nursery well-stocked with this 4-Pack Unicorns Flannel Baby Blankets from cloud island™. This pack of baby blankets includes four square blankets — two with dots and stars pattern, another with stripes and the fourth with unicorn print — to add magical finishing touch to their snuggle time. Made from cotton flannel fabric that's gentle against their delicate skin, this multipurpose baby blanket is great for comfortably nursing, cuddling and swaddling.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
